personal.name: Subham Agarwal
personal.title: Full Stack Developer, curious about building things at scale
about: Graduate in Computer Science from Vellore Institute of Technology with two internship experiences across two early-stage startups, where i worked across frontend visualization and backend integration.
I specialize in full-stack development and have proficiency in TypeScript,Next.js with strong hands-on experience with cloud, databases and RAG architectures.

projects.heading: Real-time Task Management System
projects.title: TaskQuest
projects.description: Admins create tasks on the web dashboard, and the team members can interact and update progress on assigned tasks through an intelligent Telegram bot interface.
features: Web dashboard for task creation and management
Intelligent Telegram bot interface for team members
Real-time progress updates on assigned tasks

projects.heading: AI-Powered Financial Insights
projects.title: FinTellect
projects.description: Users can search for a stock ticker and get clear, natural-language insights about the company's financials alongside correlating performance with news and macroeconomic trends, all powered by AI.
features: Vector database integration for intelligent search

projects.heading: Comprehensive Gym Management Platform
projects.title: FitFusion
projects.description: A comprehensive gym management app that allows users to look into gyms and give reviews, where gym owners can register their gyms.
